description: Letter from a certain Yiṣḥaq to Yosef b. Shabbetay al-Rūmī, Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Very deferential, filled with language of patroange (e.g. li-l-mawlā ʿuluww al-ra'y fī dhālik).The writer has sent the copy of the book and excuses the delay by saying that he fell ill in the winter and it delayed him until now. He asks Yosef to send him the copy of Bereshit, it seems because he is ready to make a copy of it and send it back to him right away. The address is in both Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic. ASE.
tags: illness letter 969-1517, Illness, Arabic address, Byzantines, illness: winter, illness: marad, book trade
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
